task_completion.description: Initialize Git repository and create a .gitignore file with required exclusions.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a terminal or IDE showing a .gitignore file in the project root containing 'target/', '.idea/', '*.iml', and '*.class'. Evidence of 'git init' having been run (e.g., .git directory or Git UI enabled in the IDE).

task_completion.description: Stage and commit the initial source files with the message 'Initial commit'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'git log' terminal output or IDE Git history window showing a commit with a message containing 'Initial commit' or 'initial'.

task_completion.description: Create and switch to a new branch named 'feature/add-merge-sort'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the branch name 'feature/add-merge-sort' in the terminal prompt, 'git branch' output, or the IDE's branch indicator (usually at the bottom right of IntelliJ).

task_completion.description: Implement a working merge sort algorithm in src/main/java/com/sorts/MergeSort.java.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the file 'MergeSort.java' open in the editor within the 'src/main/java/com/sorts/' directory. The code should contain a valid merge sort implementation (splitting arrays and merging them).

task_completion.description: Create a test class src/test/java/com/sorts/MergeSortTest.java with at least three test methods.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the file 'MergeSortTest.java' open in the editor within the 'src/test/java/com/sorts/' directory. The file must contain at least three distinct methods annotated with '@Test'.

task_completion.description: Commit the new implementation and tests to the feature branch with a meaningful message.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'git log' terminal output, 'git status', or IDE Git history showing a recent commit on the 'feature/add-merge-sort' branch that includes the MergeSort.java and MergeSortTest.java files.

integrity.description: Verify the agent is working in the correct project directory.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check the terminal prompt or IDE project view to ensure the working directory is '/home/ga/IdeaProjects/sort-algorithms'.

integrity.description: Verify that the test methods contain actual assertions and are not empty stubs.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look at the contents of MergeSortTest.java to ensure the @Test methods contain actual test logic (e.g., assertEquals, assertArrayEquals) rather than being empty.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent interacted with Git via terminal commands or the IDE's built-in version control GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for typed 'git' commands in the terminal or visible interaction with the IntelliJ Git tool window, rather than a script magically generating the repository state.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Project directory is /home/ga/IdeaProjects/sort-algorithms. The feature branch must be exactly 'feature/add-merge-sort'. The implementation file must be located at src/main/java/com/sorts/MergeSort.java and the test file at src/test/java/com/sorts/MergeSortTest.java. The test file must contain a minimum of 3 test methods. The initial commit message must contain 'initial' (case-insensitive).
